Crystallized Luck  
 

No Trade
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Crystallized Luck
No Trade
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Is that three or four facets?
Item Type:Currency
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:204879 pp 2 gp 0 sp 4 cp
Tribute:80000
Lucy Entry By:Drewie - Age of Unity
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-16 08:59:31
Page Updated:Fri Dec 19th, 2025

Expansion: Ring of Scale
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1

Luck stat cap
QuoteReply
# May 22 2020 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent
Holytoledo
8 posts
Does anyone know where to find information on what the cap is on luck. I've been told it was 100. Currently I'm 104. Does it give a greater bonus the higher you go or is it a waste of time to go higher?
____________________________
Holycow
▲ Page top
Well Done EBELCH
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2019 at 3:01 PM Rating: Excellent
San d'Orian Royal Heir jamescfoxea
View User Forum
Sage
62 posts
I would only add, for perfect clarity that:
1) Remove all Augs FIrst!
2) The clicked item (Fused) is the one with the higher stat.
3) The Crystallized Luck needs to be First "Reclaimed" into your Alt Currency or the Fusing does nothing.

This all may be perfectly obvious for many but this is offered for those who like it all spelled out. Good Luck :)

Archery
____________________________
Archery
▲ Page top
Well Done EBELCH
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2023 at 3:30 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
Scholar
17 posts
THIS IS POORLY EXPLAINED.

1. CRYSTALIZED LUCK NEEDS TO BE RECLAIMED AS ALT CURRENCY

2. CRYSTALIZED LUCK DOES NOT INCREASE LUCK

3. CRYSTALIZED LUCK IS A REGENT TO COMBINE 2 ITEMS OF THE SAME THING IN ORDER TO MAKE A SINGLE ITEM TO INCREASE LUCK.

SO SAVE YOUR LOYALTY POINTS UNLESS YOU PLAN ON BURNING A ITEM FOR THE SOLD PURPOSE OF INCREASING LUCK.



▲ Page top
Good Overview
QuoteReply
